scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @netpulse/shared && npm run build --workspace @netpulse/authz && npm run build --workspace @netpulse/api && npm run build --workspace @netpulse/prober && npm run build --workspace @netpulse/load-balancer && npm run build --workspace @netpulse/cdk && npm run build --workspace @netpulse/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @netpulse/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @netpulse/authz && npm run typecheck --workspace @netpulse/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @netpulse/prober && npm run typecheck --workspace @netpulse/load-balancer && npm run typecheck --workspace @netpulse/cdk && npm run typecheck --workspace @netpulse/web
scripts.cdk:synth: npm run build && npm run synth --workspace @netpulse/cdk
scripts.deploy:dev: npm run build && npm run deploy:dev --workspace @netpulse/cdk
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run build && npm run deploy:staging --workspace @netpulse/cdk
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build && npm run deploy:prod --workspace @netpulse/cdk
scripts.test:integration:dev: tsx scripts/integration-dev-stack.ts --env dev --profile netpulse-dev --admin-profile netpulse-root --region us-east-1
